meaning: 下关[日本本州岛西南岸港市](即马关)
examples: Thereafter this map was used as reference for the signing of Treaty of Shimonoseki.
Four groups of Shimonoseki follow up the victory by the South Xikou, Red Garden, directly toward the Tongzi county.
Japan's decision comes two months before the International Whaling Commission meets in the southwestern city of Shimonoseki.
